title: werauhia lutheri
intro: Werauhia lutheri, also known as the Luther's Werauhia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. It is a terrestrial bromeliad native to the tropical forests of New Zealand, characterized by its bright red and yellow inflorescence. The plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, to treat various health issues such as fever, sore throats, and skin conditions. Werauhia lutheri can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its herbal preparations have been used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system.
